runners.formComment: Nearing another win after claiming his maiden success on March 3 at this track over 425m. Last start was second over 410m in 23.77, behind Juneau Sangria. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.
Went up with lids and slow to begin.
Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on March 18 over 500m at this track behind Duran Olly beaten 8 lengths (28.99). Holds top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 4 length third (25.96) over 450m at Shepparton. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time despite being beaten. Follow up.

runners.formComment: Has finished seventh at the last two runs, both at Ballarat, the latest when beaten 13 lengths behind Mr. Bluey Lee over 450m. Prefer in something easier.

runners.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 12 length sixth over 510m at Sale. Not keen, needs to lift.

runners.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Tribal Advisor at Ballarat last start over 390m (22.64). Likely to play a major role.

runners.formComment: Steps up to 500m for the first time. Last appeared when fifth over 425m at this track two weeks ago. Draw will be an advantage solid claims this line-up.
